description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the busybox:latest Docker image. Define a global before_script that echoes "Before script section", "For example you might run an update here or install a build dependency", and "Or perhaps you might print out some debugging details", and a global after_script that echoes "After script section" and "For example you might do some cleanup here". Add a build stage with a build1 job that runs echo "Do your build here". Add a test stage with two parallel jobs: test1 runs echo "Do a test here" and echo "For example run a test suite", and test2 runs echo "Do another parallel test here" and echo "For example run a lint test". Add a deploy stage with a deploy1 job that runs echo "Do your deploy here".
